location.description: The city where the weather data was simulated.

date_time.description: The date and time when the weather data was recorded.

temperature_c.description: The temperature in Celsius at the given location and time.

humidity_pct.description: The humidity in percentage at the given location and time.

precipitation_mm.description: The precipitation in millimeters at the given location and time.

wind_speed_kmh.description: The wind speed in kilometers per hour at the given location and time.
